name: Header
description: Labelled section heading + optional trailing 'See all' Text Button. The composable header anatomy reused across Section, in-sheet sub-sections, bounded cards, and any other host that needs a leading title + a single trailing navigational commit. Two sizes diverge only on the label typography (heading-md / heading-sm); the trailing action is fixed at Text Button `size="xsmall"`, `appearance="accent"` per the link-affordance rule.
useCases: labelled block above a list / carousel / feed
